span.p: NO or UNCLEAR - may be diverting to competitor

span.p: NO - contact gone dark or departed

span.p: Has shipment volume declined more than 20% quarter-over-quarter?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the decline explained by seasonal or market factors - not us?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Watch - build second contact before the first leaves

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: At-risk - immediate outreach and account review

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is there an unresolved service failure or open complaint?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Has it been acknowledged and a recovery plan communicated?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the primary contact still reachable and engaged?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the account multi-threaded - multiple contacts at decision level?
